info.title: GarfiX EOS API
info.description: GarfiX Enterprise Operating System — Multi-tenant ERP + AI Fabric API for MENA businesses. Includes accounting, invoicing, inventory, HR, AI intelligence, payments, and platform admin. All endpoints require authentication (JWT access token via cookie) unless marked as public.

cookieAuth.name: access_token

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token as Authorization header (alternative to cookie).
